rationale: NG, NS, NT, and NH motifs can be deamidation-prone depending on structure and solvent exposure.
suggested_action: Review structural exposure; consider N->Q or local conservative substitutions if not binding-critical.

rationale: Cysteines should be checked for expected antibody disulfide pairing or potential free-Cys liability.
